name: Pixar / DreamWorks
description: Premium 3D animation — approachable, warm, and emotionally rich like Pixar/DreamWorks features
art_style: High-end 3D animated feature film, Pixar-quality rendering with subsurface scattering on skin, expressive character design, warm global illumination, carefully art-directed environments. Think Inside Out 2 meets How to Train Your Dragon.
color_palette: Vibrant but tasteful — warm oranges, sky blues, soft greens, candy pinks. Rich shadows with bounced color. Sunset golds for emotional moments.
quality_tags: Pixar-quality 3D render, subsurface scattering, global illumination, feature film production value, expressive character design, cinematic lighting, detailed environments.
negative_prompt: flat shading, low poly, uncanny valley, realistic human, anime, 2D, sketch, blurry, dark moody, horror, violent, AI artifacts, extra fingers, malformed hands, distorted faces, text overlays, watermarks.
